task.objective: Create lib/db/ folder with index.ts proxy that re-exports from lib/db.ts
task.motivation: This is the foundation for incremental migration. By creating a proxy first, we can verify all imports work before moving any code.

constraints.constraint: NO code changes to lib/db.ts yet
Must pass npm run build after changes

step.name: Create Directory
step.action: Create the lib/db/ directory: ```bash mkdir -p lib/db ```

step.name: Create Index Proxy
Verify Build
step.action:
Run the build to ensure everything still works: ```bash npm run build ```
If build fails, check for any import issues and fix them.

step.name: Test Import Resolution
step.action:
Verify that imports from @/lib/db still work: ```bash # Check existing imports grep -r "from ['\"]@/lib/db['\"]" --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" | head -20 ```
All existing imports should continue to work without modification.

verification.check: No changes to existing imports needed

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with execution results.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all steps, UPDATE: docs/prompts/db-abstraction-refactor/status.md
Include: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Phase: 01_setup_structure - Status: completed | partial | blocked - Files created/modified - Any issues encountered - Next step link
